title: Task 0: Add avatar column to users table

testContext.reason: current schema shape — test must assert new column exists
existing test patterns for schema tests

steps: Read the reference migration at drizzle/0004_add_bio.sql
Write failing test asserting avatar_url column exists on users table
Run tests to verify they fail (confirm RED state)
Add avatar_url column to schema and generate migration
Run tests to verify they pass (confirm GREEN state)
acceptanceCriteria: GIVEN the users table, WHEN queried, THEN it has a nullable avatar_url text column
GIVEN an existing user row, WHEN the migration runs, THEN avatar_url defaults to null
scopeBoundaries: This task owns the schema change only / avatar service is task 1
doNot: Modify any existing columns on the users table
Write the avatar upload service — that is task 1
Touch any route or serializer files
doneWhen: Migration file exists, avatar_url column is in the schema, all existing tests pass
